title: German Potato Pilaf
description: A hearty, comforting dish from Germany, featuring tender potatoes and German sausage. Serve warm, garnished with fresh parsley.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced German sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove sausage from skillet and set aside.
Add diced potatoes to skillet and cook until they begin to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add chopped onion to skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add caraway seeds, salt, and pepper to skillet and stir to combine.
Add cooked sausage back to skillet and stir to combine with potato mixture.
Add uncooked pilaf to skillet and stir to combine with potato mixture.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until pilaf is tender.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh parsley.
